changes: Added the ability to manually read item usage hints for an item by pressing space.
Fixed an error with Steam Audio initialization where it was using a hard-coded sample-rate, which prevented the game from working on devices with different sample-rate other than 48k Hz.
Motorcycles no longer have crazy top speeds.
Fixed a regression for bots that was introduced from an earlier change.
Clients now carry a disconnect reason from the server. This is used when the host requests to shutdown the server.
Add the ability to remap menu shortcuts, for example those are found in certain menus, such as online mode. You can find all shortcuts in settings, > controls, > map menu shortcuts.
serverChanges: Add an automatic updater to the server.
Add the ability to control the server from the commandline, for example changing options, updating the server or viewing the list of connected players.
